Introduction
    Two party members escort a poet and political prisoner of the Cultural Revolution on a ship to Wuhan. They sleep in a cabin with other victims of the era, who sympathize deeply with the poet.

Also known as: Nächtlicher Regen in den Bergen von Sichuan
